risk: Chart of accounts mapping incomplete - 40% of accounts unmapped across 12 entities
mitigation: Engage Finance SME to complete COA mapping by Day 1 and escalate to APAC Controller

risk: Payroll continuity at risk - Japan payroll SME not confirmed for Day 1
mitigation: Assign Yuki Sato as primary payroll SME and confirm payroll system cutover date immediately

risk: Legal entity review incomplete - 9 of 60 entities pending final action decision
mitigation: Schedule legal entity review session with Legal and Tax; target completion by Day 30

risk: Budget overrun risk - IT and Systems forecast exceeds budget by 12%
mitigation: Review IT scope assumptions and defer non-critical system integration items

risk: HR data migration not started - 480 employee records not yet mapped
mitigation: Initiate HR data mapping immediately and assign HR Integration SME to lead migration

risk: Tax registration incomplete in Malaysia - revenue recognition blocked
mitigation: Engage Regional Tax Lead to complete registration before Day 1 and do not book revenue until resolved

risk: Systems access provisioning delayed - 320 users without Day 1 access
mitigation: Coordinate with IT to accelerate provisioning and prioritise finance and operations users

risk: Vendor contracts not reviewed - 24 active contracts pending novation
mitigation: Legal to review and novate all active vendor contracts and prioritise revenue-linked contracts

risk: Finance reporting timeline at risk - first consolidated close in 28 days
mitigation: Confirm close calendar alignment with Finance leadership and assign dedicated close project manager

risk: Workforce alignment plan not finalised - reporting lines unconfirmed in 3 geographies
mitigation: Complete org design and confirm reporting lines for APAC and EMEA and Americas before Day 100

risk: SoD conflict - payroll approval and processing held by same person
mitigation: Separate payroll authorization from payroll processing immediately and assign independent approver

risk: SoD conflict - bank payment authorization and custody held by same person
mitigation: Implement dual authorization for all bank payments above USD 10K before Day 1

risk: SoD conflict - vendor master management and AP payment processing by same team
mitigation: Restrict vendor master access to Finance Controls team only; AP to process payments only

risk: SoD conflict - manual journal entry posting and approval by same person
mitigation: Require secondary approval for all manual journal entries in the General Ledger

risk: SoD conflict - AR recording and cash receipt custody not separated
mitigation: Separate AR recording from cash receipt management and assign independent AR reconciler

risk: No independent reconciler assigned for AP ledger - reconciliation backlog growing
mitigation: Assign Finance Controller as independent AP reconciler before first consolidated close

risk: Acquired entity controls framework not assessed against IBM standards
mitigation: Conduct IBM controls gap assessment for all acquired entities before Day 100

risk: GDPR data handling obligations not mapped - personal data transferred without assessment
mitigation: Engage Compliance SME to complete GDPR assessment and data transfer agreements

risk: ERP cutover plan not confirmed - risk of dual-running systems past Day 1
mitigation: Confirm ERP cutover date with IT Integration Architect and finalize data migration plan

risk: Change management communications not started - employee uncertainty increasing
mitigation: Launch Day 1 communication plan immediately and brief all managers before Day 1
